content:
Hi, how do you guys build your ultra teams? I want to make one with Jenkin and I'm struggling to make it work and I don't know if it's because my team/build is bad or I just don't know how to play with the ultra realm yet.
The team I'm running right now is Jenkin with the Cat (SR) and Mouse (SSR) wheels, Horla with her poem SR and Lullaby Devoured, Nautila with her Signature wheel and the SR that increases damage by 30% and shield by 15% and Ramona with Thais' SSR and. . . I don't remember her SR.

I would suggest:

Jenkins/Winkle/Horla 

+ 1 more your choice.
